title: tribulus spurius
intro: Tribulus spurius is a type of flowering plant in the Zygophyllaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Tribulus spurius has been reported to have various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, reducing blood pressure, and enhancing kidney function. Herbal preparations of Tribulus spurius are often made into capsules, tablets, or teas, and are commonly used as dietary supplements to support overall well-being.
